blockingIssues.description: Rotate Share button in Settings sidebar is enabled but has no click handler and is not disabled placeholder, violating requirement to either navigate to /rotate-share or be disabled.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify expected browser validation interface: either require Skill invocation for agent-browser, or explicitly document direct `agent-browser --session ...` CLI workflow and valid subcommands (`open`, `close`, etc.).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both settings-sidebar and export-flow reviewers observed workers using direct `agent-browser` CLI commands (including initial `launch` misuse and subsequent help discovery) while marking skill procedure as followed.

rejectedObservations.observation: ui-builder skill and actual agent-browser usage are mismatched (duplicate statement from second review).
